creator: mi@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

I just added the patch to the port -- thank you very much for 
the pointer. 

As for updating the UPDATING -- no, I don't think, this is 
warranted. If we were to add an entry to this file every time 
a shlib-installing port is updated, it would start growing 
too quickly to be useful...
